Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.8/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Legacy Tire Shop to get the job done right.

“Had a nail in my F-150's tire right before a trip to Mammoth Cave. Legacy got me in same-day—fixed it properly with a patch/plug combo instead of just pushing a plug in like other shops. Two years later, that repair is still holding strong.”

Marcus T. Tire Repair
Mar 14, 2025

“As a nurse commuting to Norton Hospital in all weather, I trust Legacy with my winter/summer swaps. They store my off-season tires and always remind me when it's time to switch. Last December they spotted a worn ball joint during the changeover—probably saved me from a bigger repair.”

Elena R. Seasonal Tire Changeovers
Jan 22, 2025

“These guys know their fitments. I brought in some niche JDM wheels for my Civic, and they took time to measure everything perfectly. No rubbing even when my car is fully loaded with audio equipment for car meets at Waterfront Park.”

Devon M. Custom Wheel Installation
Nov 5, 2024

“After three shops couldn't figure out why my RAV4's TPMS light kept coming on, Legacy diagnosed a corroded sensor connector in 10 minutes. Only reason I'm not giving 5 stars is because they didn't have the Toyota-specific part in stock that day.”

Sharon K. TPMS Service
Sep 17, 2024

“Our bakery's sprinter vans get hammered on Louisville streets. Legacy's fleet program keeps them rolling with scheduled rotations and after-hours service. Their mobile repair truck even fixed a blowout at 7 AM during Derby week—lifesavers.”

James P. Commercial Fleet Services
Aug 29, 2024

“Saved me from buying a set of 'like new' tires on Facebook Marketplace that had internal belt separation. The $20 inspection fee was worth avoiding what could've been a dangerous situation on I-65. Will always check here first now.”

Tiffany L. Pre-Purchase Inspection
Jul 11, 2024
Legacy Tire Shop

Trusted tire shop professionals serving Louisville, KY and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
